segments.text: Stap to six packs on a table
And I'm able to see St. I was on a label
No short, put the cloth, you know what got em
I take off the cap, my friends are tapped on the bottom
Throw my green of fleece and throw my utility
I'm so silly, cause St. I was insane
The paint lies wet, you drink it down with the gauze
Little wise head, take black to pack a drug
You gon' get your soul saved now, so drink it till it's drugs
Billie Deans, the chili cheese is down with the wheat gauze
Feel man to get a can of plain hot
I'm so silly, I'm so silly
